hero.label: Made for Complete
hero.headline: I want to help Complete become every startup's compensation system.
hero.subheadline: I am excited by Complete because compensation is one of the hardest and most important problems for startups to get right. The Founding BDR role is especially compelling to me because it sits at the intersection of founder pain, product education, and early go to market execution.

whyCompany.title: Complete solves a painful startup workflow
whyCompany.body: Startups need to move fast on hiring, but offer letters, equity, rewards, and compensation planning are often fragmented and confusing. Complete is reimagining that entire process, which makes the product easier to explain because the pain is real, urgent, and tied directly to growth.

whyCompany.title: Why this stage/moment is exciting
whyCompany.body: A Founding BDR role means there is a real chance to shape messaging, outbound strategy, and early pipeline generation from the ground up. That is exciting to me because I want to learn in an environment where execution matters every day and where strong work can directly influence company growth.

whyCompany.title: Connection to Ignacio's background
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I worked as a BDR doing cold outreach, running LinkedIn sequences, and using HubSpot to help acquire 15 to 20 paying clients. More recently at NextAfter, I sharpened my digital marketing skills in a B2B consulting environment, which helped me think more deeply about messaging, audience pain points, and conversion.

quote: I want this role because Complete is selling into a problem every growing startup feels, even if they do not have a clean system for it yet. That is the kind of product I would be excited to talk about every day.
